By Taxpayers Association of Oregon OregonWatchdog.com The Oregonian has a story about the dramatic change in Multnomah County taxpayer migration since a big income tax increase was passed in 2020. The Preschool-for-All ballot measure raised income taxes by 1.5% to 3%.  A second big income tax was passed in the same year with the Homeless […]

** More AI Hallucinations in an Oregon Court (https://oregoncatalyst.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a87f3bde94b788cb6aaff54b0&id=f656eb54cd&e=68a6393ac8)
------------------------------------------------------------

Last fall, I wrote about an instance where a lawyer was caught using fake citations that were generated from artificial intelligence. It happened again in Oregon District Court, where Magistrate Judge Mark Clarke sanctioned a lawyer fairly severely in Couvrette v. Wisnovsky. The Judge questioned whether the lawyer meaningfully participated in the case: At issue […]

By Taxpayers Association of Oregon Foundation, The Clackamas County Interagency Task Force has just seized 3,500 marijuana plants, $100,000 cash, three firearms, during an illegal grow operation bust. See more. We were told that if we legalized marijuana, the black market would disappear.  Instead it feels like it is growing.  The $100,000 cash discovered is […]
